# Sprint Planning

**Date:** March 15, 2026 at 10:00 AM
**Duration:** 60:00

## Transcript

We kicked off sprint 14 planning. The main focus areas are the API migration, dashboard redesign, and performance improvements for the search indexer.

Total velocity last sprint was 42 points. We're planning for 38 this sprint since Dave is out Thursday and Friday.

Key stories: PROJ-201 API migration phase 2 (8 pts), PROJ-198 Dashboard core metrics (5 pts), PROJ-210 Search indexer optimization (3 pts), PROJ-215 Fix auth token refresh (2 pts).

We decided to prioritize the auth fix since it's blocking QA testing. Sarah will own the API migration work, Alice takes the dashboard, and Dave handles the search optimization before his time off.
